news.t: First Trust Expands Its Target Outcome Laddered Fund Suite with Three New Strategies

overview.description: The FT Vest Laddered U.S. Equity Uncapped Accelerator ETF (BFXU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in enhanced growth alternatives. The fund provides US large-cap exposure through a laddered portfolio of four ETFs. Each underlying fund aims to provide returns outperforming the SPY ETF through FLEX options and constructing call spreads combined with deep-in-the-money long calls. BFXU was launched on Apr 7, 2026 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Expands Its Target Outcome Laddered Fund Suite with Three New Strategies
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust” or “FTA”), a leading provider of exchange-traded funds (“ETFs”) and outcome-based strategies, announced today the launch of thr...
